name: Elena Valencia
description: Elena organized a volunteer network that prepares hot meals for unhoused neighbors twice a week out of a local church basement.

name: Bernal Heights Watch Crew
description: A group of Bernal neighbors who built an active community check-in system for older adults living alone on the hills.

name: Wong Family Association
description: Organized young bilingual volunteers to translate public health, voting, and housing resources for elderly residents in Chinatown.

name: Tom Green
description: Tom personally planted and cares for over 50 sidewalk garden plots, turning gray concrete corridors into green flower walks.

name: Excelsior Community Helpers
description: Creating safe after-school study spaces in local cafes and pairing high schoolers with younger students for reading support.
